info.name: TZ English Learning Platform API
info.description: Mock API collection for TZ English Learning Platform - Student & Tutor functionality

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints for both Students and Tutors

request.description: Send SMS verification code to phone number
Complete profile setup on first login. English levels: beginner, elementary, pre-intermediate, intermediate, upper-intermediate, advanced, ielts
Get all stories (tutor lessons and student journeys)
